w2wPortfolio.siteLabel: Wok To Walk — gas wok quick-service
w2wPortfolio.notes: Flagship pattern: open kitchen gas woks, late-night demand, high ventilation load. Prioritise gas contract competitiveness, burner turndown, and hood/HVAC coupling before generic electricity-only plays.

wok-to-walk.notes: Company-level defaults: gas and hospitality tariffs are usually the biggest lever before small electrical optimisations. Per-site overrides in bySiteId when a branch differs.
